title: EVA 01 Soul Knowledge
wikitext:
[]: EVA-01 Soul Knowledge             Quote Post by Zephirotycvm117 » Wed May 05, 2010 11:39 pm Hi, I know that Yui's soul resides inside the Eva, but I would like to who of the Eva characters certainly knew about it. Gendo Fuyutsuki Seele members? Ritsuko? Kaji? etc Thanks, is just that I'm writing a fanfiction and I need to know who knows xD

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu May 06, 2010 12:57 am Gendo, Fuyutsuki, and Ritsuko for sure. We can deduce that Seele know, as well, even though they never IIRC say they do. Kaji knows in the manga, but in the TV show, not sure.

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Thu May 06, 2010 1:05 am I don't recall any indication towards Kaji knowing who is inside Unit-01. Naoko probably knew, but she's dead by the time of the show, so she doesn't really count.

[]:             Quote Post by Zephirotycvm117 » Thu May 06, 2010 10:07 am about Kaji I'm not sure, I mean, he surely knows in the manga about Shinjis motheR death inside the Eva, and that Shinji was thEre when in happened, he made him remember... but I'm not sure he knows about Yui being inside the EVA.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Thu May 06, 2010 3:49 pm Pretty much everyone knows except Shinji. They're all just sort of fucking with him.
